content.description: We’re hiring 2 Part-Time Teaching Assistants for Modules 2 and 3 in the Computer Science Department. Ideal candidates must have strong comprehensive proficiency in Chinese, mathematics, and English, paired with excellent communication skills to effectively support student learning. This hybrid role requires 15 hours weekly, combining in-person and remote tasks like assisting with module content, answering student queries, and backing instructional activities.
responsibilities: Support teaching activities for this module
